name: causal-bank-torch-cuda-frontier-18x-routed-e8
goal: Reproduce the current best routed causal-bank pure-causal line on CUDA so slop GPUs can take over frontier training and emit the promoted opc-export bundle artifact.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train train-causal-bank-torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --steps 2600 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --seed 42 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind routed_sqrelu_experts --linear-readout-num-experts 8 --probe-steps 1000,1800,2200,2600 --probe-eval-batches 8 --final-eval-batches 50 --device cuda --json /run/causal_bank_torch_cuda_frontier_18x_routed_e8.json --export-dir /run/export

name: chronohorn-row-stats-100m
goal: Build the 100M oracle row-stats artifact off-Mac so the packed compiler branch can advance in parallel.
command: export PATH=/usr/local/cargo/bin:$PATH; export CARGO_HOME=/cache/cargo; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/cache/target/chronohorn-rowstats-100m; cargo build --release --manifest-path /snapshot/Cargo.toml; /cache/target/chronohorn-rowstats-100m/release/chronohorn build-causal-bank-ngram-oracle-row-stats /snapshot/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 /run/chronohorn_oracle_row_stats_100m.bin 100000000 1000000 tiny 1 | tee /run/report.txt
